flags.description: Master toggle for POST / PATCH / DELETE on themes, presets, and overrides. Off = read-only mode (incident response). Existing themes still render — only mutation is disabled.
Toggle for POST /themes/{theme}/activate. Off = admins may create + edit themes but cannot flip is_active. Useful during a CSS regen incident when you want to prevent further cache churn.

Toggle for RegenerateRenderedCssJob. Off = tokens_snapshot updates on activation but no compiled CSS rebuild fires. Frontend falls back to prior compiled CSS URL (stale but valid). Never off in production.
Toggle for ContrastAuditor. Off = ThemeAccessibilityRecommendationNotification never fires. Findings are informational only, so this flag is a cosmetic silencer, not a compliance signal.
Toggle for PreviewPresetJob (Puppeteer thumbnail generation). Off = preview_thumbnail_url stays NULL on new presets; admin UI falls back to a color-swatch placeholder.
Toggle for PurgeExpiredThemeSnapshotsJob. Off = historical themes retained indefinitely (useful during compliance audit windows).
